question: From the GitHub repository files in 'github_repos.sample_files' joined with 'github_repos.sample_contents', which 10 programming languages occur most frequently (based on recognized file extensions) in files that have non-empty content, ordered by their file counts in descending order?
evidence: Programming languages and their file extensions mapping: Assembly (.asm, .nasm), C (.c, .h), C# (.cs), C++ (.c++, .cpp, .h++, .hpp), CSS (.css), Clojure (.clj), Common Lisp (.lisp), D (.d), Dart (.dart), Dockerfile (Dockerfile, .dockerfile), Elixir (.ex, .exs), Erlang (.erl), Go (.go), Groovy (.groovy), HTML (.html, .htm), Haskell (.hs), Haxe (.hx), JSON (.json), Java (.java), JavaScript (.js, .cjs), Julia (.jl), Kotlin (.kt, .ktm, .kts), Lua (.lua), MATLAB (.matlab, .m), Markdown (.md, .markdown, .mdown), PHP (.php), PowerShell (.ps1, .psd1, .psm1), Python (.py), R (.r), Ruby (.rb), Rust (.rs), SCSS (.scss), SQL (.sql), Sass (.sass), Scala (.scala), Shell (.sh, .bash), Swift (.swift), TypeScript (.ts), Vue (.vue), XML (.xml), YAML (.yml, .yaml).
temp_SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS language_count, /* Count occurrences */ CASE /* Mapping file extensions to languages */ WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.asm' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.nasm' THEN 'Assembly' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.c' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.h' THEN 'C' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.cs' THEN 'C#' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.c++' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.cpp' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.h++' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.hpp' THEN 'C++' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.css' THEN 'CSS' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.clj' THEN 'Clojure' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.lisp' THEN 'Common Lisp' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.d' THEN 'D' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.dart' THEN 'Dart' WHEN f."path" ILIKE 'Dockerfile' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.dockerfile' THEN 'Dockerfile' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.ex' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.exs' THEN 'Elixir' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.erl' THEN 'Erlang' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.go' THEN 'Go' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.groovy' THEN 'Groovy' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.html' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.htm' THEN 'HTML' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.hs' THEN 'Haskell' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.hx' THEN 'Haxe' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.json' THEN 'JSON' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.java' THEN 'Java' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.js' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.cjs' THEN 'JavaScript' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.jl' THEN 'Julia' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.kt' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.ktm' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.kts' THEN 'Kotlin' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.lua' THEN 'Lua' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.matlab' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.m' THEN 'MATLAB' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.md' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.markdown' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.mdown' THEN 'Markdown' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.php' THEN 'PHP' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.ps1' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.psd1' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.psm1' THEN 'PowerShell' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.py' THEN 'Python' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.r' THEN 'R' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.rb' THEN 'Ruby' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.rs' THEN 'Rust' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.scss' THEN 'SCSS' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.sass' THEN 'Sass' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.scala' THEN 'Scala' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.sh' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.bash' THEN 'Shell' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.swift' THEN 'Swift' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.ts' THEN 'TypeScript' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.vue' THEN 'Vue' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.xml' THEN 'XML' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.yml' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.yaml' THEN 'YAML' END AS programming_language /* Determine programming language based on file extension */ FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id" WHERE c."content" IS NOT NULL AND c."content" <> '' /* Filter for non-empty content */ GROUP BY programming_language ORDER BY language_count DESC LIMIT 10 /* Limit to top 10 languages */
final_SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS language_count, /* Count occurrences */ CASE /* Mapping file extensions to languages */ WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.asm' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.nasm' THEN 'Assembly' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.c' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.h' THEN 'C' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.cs' THEN 'C#' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.c++' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.cpp' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.h++' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.hpp' THEN 'C++' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.css' THEN 'CSS' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.clj' THEN 'Clojure' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.lisp' THEN 'Common Lisp' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.d' THEN 'D' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.dart' THEN 'Dart' WHEN f."path" ILIKE 'Dockerfile' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.dockerfile' THEN 'Dockerfile' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.ex' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.exs' THEN 'Elixir' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.erl' THEN 'Erlang' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.go' THEN 'Go' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.groovy' THEN 'Groovy' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.html' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.htm' THEN 'HTML' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.hs' THEN 'Haskell' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.hx' THEN 'Haxe' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.json' THEN 'JSON' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.java' THEN 'Java' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.js' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.cjs' THEN 'JavaScript' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.jl' THEN 'Julia' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.kt' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.ktm' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.kts' THEN 'Kotlin' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.lua' THEN 'Lua' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.matlab' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.m' THEN 'MATLAB' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.md' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.markdown' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.mdown' THEN 'Markdown' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.php' THEN 'PHP' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.ps1' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.psd1' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.psm1' THEN 'PowerShell' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.py' THEN 'Python' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.r' THEN 'R' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.rb' THEN 'Ruby' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.rs' THEN 'Rust' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.scss' THEN 'SCSS' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.sass' THEN 'Sass' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.scala' THEN 'Scala' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.sh' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.bash' THEN 'Shell' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.swift' THEN 'Swift' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.ts' THEN 'TypeScript' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.vue' THEN 'Vue' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.xml' THEN 'XML' WHEN f."path" ILIKE '%.yml' OR f."path" ILIKE '%.yaml' THEN 'YAML' END AS programming_language /* Determine programming language based on file extension */ FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" f JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" c ON f."id" = c."id" WHERE c."content" IS NOT NULL AND c."content" <> '' /* Filter for non-empty content */ GROUP BY programming_language ORDER BY language_count DESC LIMIT 10 /* Limit to top 10 languages */
